title: Economic Policy Working and Research Papers
summary: This is a Treasury Department listing page cataloging Office of Economic Policy working papers from 2020, 2021, and 2024. The page contains only paper titles and years, not the full research content. Papers cover topics including the American Rescue Plan, AI exposure, emergency rental assistance, mortgage rate shocks, racial labor inequality, and PPP loans.
key_points: Page is a listing/catalog of working papers, not the actual research documents
2024 papers include: American Rescue Plan mapping, AI occupational exposure, emergency rental assistance, mortgage rate shocks, racial labor inequality
2021 papers include: expectations information extraction, expectations gap
2020 papers include: PPP loan job preservation effects
No publication date provided for the page itself
Papers are labeled as works in progress subject to revision; views are authors' own, not official Treasury positions
why_it_matters: This page is a navigation index only. It does not provide actionable macro catalyst information. Individual papers would need to be accessed separately for substantive content. The listing itself offers no concrete economic data, forecasts, or policy decisions.

issues_found: Listing page per CORE RULE 5 and RULE 6 - listing pages should be rejected
Source contains only paper titles and years, no substantive research content
No publication date provided for the page itself, only for individual papers listed
Cannot assess macro catalyst relevance without accessing individual papers
event_type correctly set to 'unknown' but the record is still non-archivable due to source type

notes: Non-archiveable listing page. No publication date available. The page provides no actionable macro catalyst or market structure data—it is merely an index of working paper titles. Individual papers would need to be retrieved and evaluated separately for substantive content. Per CORE RULE 6, listing pages should be flagged as non-archiveable. Papers span 2020-2024; most recent are ~2 years old.

reasoning: Listing page only - no substantive content
Individual papers needed for actual research content
